title: Protocol of the technical condition of case study building in Võru and on site non-destructive testing (May and October 2023)

description: Protocol of in situ non-destructive testing results (moisture content testing, rebound hammer compressive strength testing) and visual inspection of case study building in Võru, Estonia held in May and October 2023.
